## Summary
Coffee is a hot beverage brewed from roasted coffee beans in hot water.

## Body
Coffee is a widely consumed hot drink, brewed by passing hot water through ground
roasted beans, and served plain or with milk. This is **synthetic fixture content** for
the Model & Retrieval Substrate contract — it names no real person, place, or
organisation. (It is deliberately near-topic to `tea.md` so the re-rank and
duplicate-candidate behaviour can be exercised.)
